hyperedges.label: Agent Avatar Series — Shared Visual Identity
hyperedges.note: All three avatars share identical design language: 3D cartoon render, black background, orange superhero cape, orange-accented headphones/headset, black outfit, hands-on-hips heroic pose. They represent diverse AI agent personas (female sunglasses, female casual, male bearded) for user selection in the App Builder.

nodes.label: Card 5 — Jobs Completed vs At Risk

nodes.label: Style Constraints
nodes.rationale: All visual language must be extended from the existing Radar page/DSO card reference. No new colors, components, or visual elements allowed. Colors restricted to red (#EF4444), green (#22C55E), amber (#F59E0B), dark navy. Final output: 1440px full-page frame.

nodes.label: Avatar Background
nodes.description: Abstract geometric background image featuring overlapping parallelogram/diamond shapes in warm red, orange, and brown tones with a gradient. Uses a bold angular zigzag pattern suggesting motion or energy. Designed as a decorative background for agent avatar cards or hero sections.

nodes.label: Agent Collection Avatar
nodes.description: 3D rendered cartoon-style character (male) wearing an orange hoodie under a black leather jacket and a dark knit beanie hat, photographed against a black background. High-quality stylized avatar illustration used to represent an agent persona in the agent collection or marketplace.

links.note: Agent 1: female character, dark bob haircut, sunglasses, orange-accented headset with mic, black t-shirt, orange superhero cape, hands on hips — confident tech support superhero persona

Both share the same 3D cartoon style, black outfit, orange cape, headset, and black background — consistent avatar series

Agent 2: female character, dark hair in bun with orange bow headband, orange-accented headphones, black knit top, orange superhero cape, hands on hips — friendly tech support superhero persona
Both share the same 3D cartoon style, black outfit, orange cape, headset, and black background — consistent avatar series
agent-2.png is one of the agent avatar image files in the agents directory set

Agent 3: male character, curly dark hair, beard and mustache, orange-accented headset with mic, black cable-knit sweater, orange superhero cape, hands on hips — authoritative tech support superhero persona

Avatar set lives in src/imports/agents, indicating it is imported and used within the App Builder UI as selectable agent identities or personas

links.label: avatar background pairs with avatar illustration for agent card composition

links.description: 3D illustrated character of a bearded man wearing headphones with an orange superhero cape on a black background — represents a dispatch/support agent persona used as an avatar or hero illustration in the agent builder UI
Dispatch avatar and empty-toolkit icon are both part of the agent builder feature set, likely appearing on the agent configuration or onboarding surface
3D rendered gear icon overlaid with a hammer and wrench — represents a tools/toolkit concept, used as the illustration for an empty state when no tools have been added to an agent's toolkit

links.notes: Magnifying glass and star rating visual elements suggest quality review / inspection role
Both use the same 3D superhero avatar style with orange capes, arms-crossed pose, and are scoped to review-related agent roles within the same imports/agents directory
Headset mic and suit combined with superhero cape suggest sales or customer-facing review agent role

links.rationale: Character wears an orange cape (superhero/action motif) and has hands on hips in a confident stance, representing an agent persona for the Weather Lead role
The orange cape and dark sweater with white dashes (resembling weather/rain marks) tie the visual identity specifically to a weather-themed agent
Image shows a 3D-rendered cartoon character with curly hair, mustache, dark sweater with white dashes, and an orange cape — clearly a 3D cartoon illustration style
